candidate_definition_hints.text: A GitHub Action that ensures that your PR title matches the Conventional Commits spec

This is a GitHub Action that ensures that your pull request titles match the [Conventional Commits spec](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/). Typically, this is used in combination with a tool like [semantic-release](https://github.com/semantic-release/semantic-release) to aut…
